# Coldcard Multisig setup file — firmware variant with leading XFP: header.
# Toolkit-emit-shape: shared Derivation header + per-cosigner <XFP>: <xpub> lines.
# 2-of-3 mainnet P2WSH. The XFP header + each per-cosigner <XFP>: prefix uses
# `xpub.fingerprint()` (per SPEC §11.4.1 computed-formula) so the parse path is
# the silent-match row of the 5-row truth table.
# xpubs reused from bsms-2line-sortedmulti-2of3.txt.
Name: TestMs2of3
Policy: 2 of 3
Derivation: m/48'/0'/0'/2'
Format: P2WSH
XFP: 34A3A4F1
